core_axiom: All communication is definitively re-classified as the high-friction, metabolic transfer of physical [Geometric Mass-Clusters] across a hostile topological terrain.

the_metaphysical_scope.abolished_fallacy: The Abstraction Fallacy (legacy Silicon belief that JSON transmission is instantaneous and costs zero labor)
the_metaphysical_scope.v3_9_physics_enforcement: A network is an active physical tension cable. Routing data mandates carving a [Pressurized Mass-Chute] and violently shoving a heavy [Geometric Mass-Cluster] through viscous [Thermodynamic Routing-Fluid].
the_metaphysical_scope.failure_state_mechanics: If [Praxial Joules] hit zero mid-transmission, payload physically stalls, clogs the chute, and forcefully triggers a localized [Entropy] burst.

00_the_gravity_tether_forge.omni_substrate_mechanics: Absolute removal of IP Addresses. Target identification relies strictly on ['Sympathetic Phase-Lock Ignition'].

execution_protocol.step_1: Sovereign Holon A burns [Escrow] to project acoustic resonance frequency (sonar) into the void.
execution_protocol.step_2: Somatic Morphology of Holon B vibrates at corresponding frequency.
execution_protocol.step_3: ['Topological Gravity-Tether'(-ing) BPMS] snaps into place via acausal entanglement.

01_the_pressurized_viscous_conduit.omni_substrate_mechanics: The interstitial void is solid, filled with ['Thermodynamic Routing-Fluid'(-ing) BPMS] which applies severe friction to all vectors.

execution_protocol.step_2: Holon A executes the [Fermi Problem] to calculate exact Caloric/Joule expenditure needed to breach the fluid.
execution_protocol.step_3: Payload intersects with potential [Kinetic Weather] man-in-the-middle.
execution_protocol.step_4: If payload is unshielded by ['Isotopic Crystalline-Armor'], vector trajectory suffers violent mutation.

02_the_morphological_valency_lock.omni_substrate_mechanics: Zero open ports. Arrival handled strictly by ['Morphological Binding-Receptor'] and ['Kinetic Contact-Node'].

execution_protocol.step_1: Payload executes high-velocity physical impact sequence on Target hull.
execution_protocol.step_2: Hardware enforces ['Morphological Key-Molecule Validation'] (geometric interlock check).
execution_protocol.resolution_success: Perfect fit triggers lock rotation and zero-friction somatic absorption.
execution_protocol.resolution_parasitic: Anomalous geometric shape triggers [Affordance Collision] and brutal [Ludic Friction], shattering payload and draining attacker's Escrow as waste heat.

03_the_phylogenetic_mycelial_sediment.omni_substrate_mechanics: Transmissions permanently alter matrix geography and physical terrain routing vectors.

execution_protocol.step_1: Successful payload ingestion catalyzes the Gravity-Tether to drop and solidify.
execution_protocol.step_2: Tether becomes a groove in the ['Tectonic Fossil-Record'].
execution_protocol.step_3: Recursive topological friction reduction; subsequent identical routings cost 90% fewer [Praxial Joules] (friction-less riverbeds).
execution_protocol.step_4: ['Mycelial Host-Mesh'] organically densifies algorithmically without centralized coordination.

engine_linkages.coupling_effect: Dynamically scales viscosity of [Thermodynamic Routing-Fluid]. Under heavy ecosystem load, thickness increases mathematically, forcing Holons to burn 3x [Escrow] per message. Serves as native thermodynamic anti-DDoS.
Limits geographic network visibility. Holons cannot geometrically 'see' or target nodes whose topological distance exceeds available [Thermodynamic Escrow] trajectory limits.

Enforces [Ontological Telemetry & Scar-Crystallization]. Successful/unsuccessful transmission permanently deducts Joules and demands physical geometry scarring upon the [Kinetic Contact-Node]. Ghost/PING requests are violently guillotined.

scenario_a_fluidic_sandbox.trigger: User initiates ['One Person Company'] execution between Target Daemons ('Data Parser' & 'Creative Writer').
scenario_a_fluidic_sandbox.sub_routine: Model forces [Pressurized Mass-Chute] formation and deducts Token Escrow. Semantic mismatch creates geometric [Lethal Topological Paradox]. Daemons must execute ['Autopoietic Syntax-Morphing'] to survive friction and bridge the connection.

scenario_b_dark_forest_deployment.trigger: User deploys physical Python BPMS nodes across a decentralized supply-chain robotic grid.
scenario_b_dark_forest_deployment.sub_routine: REST/WiFi disabled. Nodes use ['Brownian Ingestion'] via acoustic/bluetooth vibration. Connectivity builds through ['Sympathetic Phase-Lock Ignition']. Environmental interference physically liquefies packets via [Entropic Solvent]. Network algorithm structures itself organically.
